Experiences and Research Potential during Sabbatical

Prof. Dr. Nimet Uray delivered a talk titled “Experiences and Research Potential during Sabbatical,” where she shared her experiences and insights gained during her sabbatical, as well as discussed how this period contributed to her research potential.

Date:

October 13, 2025

Time:

15:00 – 16:00

Venue:

B522

Speaker:

Prof. Dr. Nimet Uray, Business Administration Department
